name: codex-session-logging
description: Capture Codex user prompts and assistant responses for user-owned Supabase session history.

interface.shortDescription: Capture prompt and assistant message history.
interface.longDescription: Codex Session Logging captures UserPromptSubmit and Stop hook payloads, spools exact message content locally, and queues upload-ready records for a private Supabase Storage bucket with Postgres index rows.
defaultPrompt: Drain queued Codex session logs to Supabase
